creator: exploringlondon
caption:
7 amazing food spots that I can’t stop thinking about in London 🤤 Save this post for your next foodie adventure!

1. @mattarellobologneseuk 
📍 Aldgate
🇮🇹 Authentic Italian food, handmade pasta, bruschetta, etc and they are certified gluten-free!

2. @houseofhabesha_official at the @towerbridge_collective 
📍 Tower Brigde
🇪🇷 Authentic Eritrean platter (I had the delicious vegan platter) with the most incredible view of Tower Bridge!

3. @chez_antoinette 
📍 Covent Garden
🇫🇷 Adorable, cosy French restaurant run by a husband-wife duo! It feels like you’re back in their home in Lyon!

4. @cruffins_london 
📍 Covent Garden
🇱🇻 Fluffy cruffins (croissant muffins) with so many different flavours, from Riga, Latvia

5. @weareima 
📍 Exmouth Market
🇯🇵 Still the best veggie sushi and Japanese food I’ve had in London, so innovative and delicious!

6. @tofuveganlondon 
📍 Several locations across London (I’ve been to them all!)
🇨🇳 The best vegan Chinese food, so many incredible dishes and dim sum to try!

7. @lavolondon 
📍 Marylebone 
🇮🇹 Italian restaurant with an incredible 20 layer peanut butter and chocolate cake! They also do an unlimited weekend brunch!

Share this with someone who needs this list!

#londonfood #londonfoodguide
